text: {"claims":[{"statement":"Australia is currently suffering from bushfires.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Australia is currently suffering from bushfires and one of its causes is the coal industry.","entailment":"The quoted sentence directly states that Australia is presently experiencing bushfires.","population":"Australia","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"bushfires","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"One of the causes of Australia's bushfires is the coal industry.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Australia is currently suffering from bushfires and one of its causes is the coal industry.","entailment":"The quote links the coal industry as a cause of the bushfires in Australia.","population":"Australia","intervention":"coal industry","comparator":"","outcome":"bushfires","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"associational"},{"statement":"Australia is one of the highest exporters of natural gas, coal, iron ore and uranium.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"As one of the highest exporters of natural gas, coal, iron ore and uranium, the country has not been able to fully suppress the effect of such on the climate.","entailment":"The quoted passage explicitly describes Australia as a top exporter of those resources.","population":"Australia","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"The coal industry has channeled increased global warming.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"This has, however, channeled increased global warming.","entailment":"The sentence states that the coal industry’s actions have led to a rise in global warming.","population":"","intervention":"coal industry","comparator":"","outcome":"increased global warming","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"causal"}]}
